hud.surfacePrompt: MOVE CLOSER TO A CRYSTAL TO EXTRACT

lore: Dive 01 — Systems nominal. Ether Crystals detected on the seabed. We disturbed ancient sediment. Caution advised.
Dive 02 — Local fauna reacted to drilling vibrations. Four-meter abyssal fish documented. Aggressive.
Dive 03 — New creatures identified: colonial cephalopods. They emit spores and appear coordinated. Origin: hydrothermal fissures.
Dive 04 — WARNING: Nadir infection in reservoir D. Spawn creatures inside the hull. Helix blocked purge protocol.
Dive 05 — Class-3 Leviathan sighted. 12 meters. Jaws capable of tearing titanium plating. Do not deploy without escort.
Dive 06 — Nadir is adapting to the heat of our systems. Spawn show new attack patterns. I fear they learned.
Dive 07 — Khepri-9 compromised. If this is read: the ocean is not empty. It never was. And now it's too late.
briefs: WAVE 1/5: Eliminate local fauna. Collect 5 crystals to return. Your ally will cover the flank.
Resistance increasing. Fauna is more aggressive after the first extractions. Watch for Spawn.
REPORT: Nadir-Spawn creatures detected on your collection route. Fast movers. Shoot first.
ALERT: Larger Leviathan registered in this zone. Focus fire. Do not waste ammo.
URGENT: Critical infection level. Collect the crystals and fall back. The station cannot hold much longer.
nadirStatus: Spawn traces found in ventilation gaps.
Active biofilm in heating ducts. Slow growth.
ALERT: Spawn inside life-support sector. Purge required.
CRITICAL RISK: Nadir controls core systems. Survival unlikely.

notes.bio: Nadir parasitized the suit filters. Your lungs inhaled colonial spores.
notes.battery: Without heating, 120 atm pressure crushed the suit in under 3 seconds.
notes.hull: Leviathan jaws punctured the main hull. Immediate decompression.
notes.combat: Torn apart by abyssal fauna. Your remains will feed the ecosystem we disturbed.
notes.default: Helix Corporation regrets to inform you. Your family will receive the minimum contract payout.

causes.rippedByLeviathan: Torn apart by a Class-3 Leviathan.
causes.hullBreachByLeviathans: Khepri-9 hull failed under Leviathan jaws.
causes.killedByProjectile: Taken down by an abyssal fauna projectile.
causes.noHeatingPressure: No heating. 120 atm pressure crushed the suit.
